title: Creamy Pesto Chicken with Roasted Tomatoes (High-Protein Recipe) | Eati
introduction: Creamy Pesto Chicken with Roasted Tomatoes combines tender chicken with pesto, roasted tomatoes, and a creamy sauce feel. It is filling, high-protein, and made to be meal-prep friendly.

sections.heading: Ingredients
sections.content:
- Chicken
- Pesto
- Roasted tomatoes
- Garlic
- Parmesan
- Herbs
- Creamy sauce base
- Salt and pepper

sections.heading: Instructions
sections.content:
1. Season chicken and cook until browned and cooked through.
2. Add garlic and herbs; stir to develop aroma.
3. Warm pesto and mix into the sauce base.
4. Stir in roasted tomatoes and parmesan.
5. Combine with chicken, simmer briefly, then serve and log in Eati.

sections.heading: Calories, Fat, and Protein (Estimated)
sections.content:
Calories: 642 kcal per serving (estimated)
Fat: 43g
Protein: 50g

Tip: parmesan and cream drive fat calories; portion carefully.

conclusion: This dish is big on flavor and protein, making it a strong choice for building consistent macros. Track it in Eati.
